name: algomim
description: Consult Algomim for reusable AEC expert context across connected tools and projects.

interface.shortDescription: Built for consistent CAD and BIM results.
interface.longDescription: Consult Algomim for AEC expert context on explicit request or proactively when specialist guidance is materially useful. Codex carries the relevant intent, project evidence, connected capabilities, prior guidance, and execution results into each independent consultation, then continues the work with the available tools.
defaultPrompt: @algomim Review the current project using the available evidence and connected tools, then continue with the necessary checks.
@algomim Get the expert context needed for this design task, use the connected applications to complete it, and verify the result.
@algomim Evaluate the current approach, identify the relevant standards and verification criteria, then continue the work using the available tools.
